scripts.setup: pnpm --dir app install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm --dir protocol install --frozen-lockfile --ignore-workspace && bun --cwd server install --frozen-lockfile
scripts.app:check: pnpm --dir app format:check && pnpm --dir app lint && pnpm --dir app typecheck && pnpm --dir app test:unit
scripts.protocol:check: pnpm --dir protocol format:check && pnpm --dir protocol lint:sol && pnpm --dir protocol typecheck && pnpm --dir protocol test
scripts.server:check: bun --cwd server run typecheck && bun --cwd server test
scripts.test: pnpm run app:test && pnpm run protocol:test && bun --cwd server test
scripts.check: pnpm run app:check && pnpm run protocol:check && pnpm run server:check
scripts.format: pnpm --dir app format && pnpm --dir protocol format
scripts.format:check: pnpm --dir app format:check && pnpm --dir protocol format:check
